researched_category.notes: Grain is an AI notetaker that records, transcribes, summarizes, and enriches meeting data. It provides AI-powered meeting notes, transcripts, highlights, and integrations for AI agents.

one_liner.value: AI-powered meeting recording, transcription, and conversation intelligence platform with API and MCP server for agent access
one_liner.notes: Grain captures meetings, provides AI notes/transcripts, and offers APIs and an MCP server to let AI agents query meeting data.

methods.notes: Grain supports OAuth2 Authorization Code flow (with PKCE), Personal Access Tokens (PAT), and Workspace Access Tokens (WAT). All methods authenticate via 'Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>' header. PATs are self-serve generated from the Grain settings page.

authentication.notes: For a multi-user agent toolkit, OAuth2 is the recommended method since it allows any Grain user to authorize access. Personal Access Token is simpler for single-user/developer scenarios.

access.notes: Free plan does NOT include API access. API access requires a paid Starter plan ($19/seat/month billed annually) or higher. Business plan includes MCP server. Self-serve signup is free with no credit card required, but upgrading to a paid plan is needed for API credentials. No admin approval or partnership needed for Starter plan.

summary.value: Grain provides a documented public REST API (v2) with endpoints for recordings, transcripts, notes, highlights, teams, meeting types, and webhooks. API domain is api.grain.com. Versioned via 'Public-Api-Version' header (current: 2025-10-31). Rate limit: 300 req/min. Webhooks supported (recording added, highlight added, recording removed, etc). The API is in active development (v1 legacy, v2 current).

agent_interface.notes: Grain has an official MCP server at https://api.grain.com/_/mcp with extensive documented tools (list_meetings, fetch_meeting, fetch_meeting_transcript, fetch_meeting_notes, search_meetings, search_companies, search_persons, list_workspace_users, etc). Business/Enterprise plans have additional tools like list_coaching_feedback, list_open_deals. Claude native integration supported. ChatGPT support in early access. Also available via npx mcp-remote for any MCP client.

rationale.value: Grain has a well-documented public REST API (v2) with multiple auth methods (OAuth2, PATs), moderate breadth of endpoints (recordings, transcripts, notes, highlights, webhooks), and an official MCP server. The API is ready for integration. The primary consideration is that API access requires a paid plan (Starter at $19/seat/month or higher), but this is a standard SaaS pricing model and does not block building a toolkit. An official MCP server already exists, making agent integration straightforward.

s1.quote: Grain captures and enriches your meetings, then delivers them to Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI tool so your agents can do the work.
s1.title: Grain | The AI Notetaker Built for Growing Teams

s2.quote: Use Grain for free with your whole team. Upgrade for unlimited meetings, advanced AI & agent workflows, conversational intelligence, and additional features.
s2.title: Pricing | Grain

s3.quote: The Grain MCP (Model Context Protocol) connects Claude.ai (and other AI chat clients) directly to your meeting data in Grain, enabling powerful AI-powered individual workflows.
s3.title: Official Grain MCP Server: Quick Start Guide

s4.quote: Free plan ... API access [is] not included. Starter Plan includes API access for exporting transcripts and integrating Grain with other tools to build custom workflows and automations.
s4.title: Plans | Grain

s5.quote: Grain MCP supports easy setup as a native Claude Integration. ... Free & Starter Plan MCP Tools: list_meetings, fetch_meeting, fetch_meeting_transcript, fetch_meeting_notes, search_meetings, ... Business & Enterprise Plan MCP Tools: list_coaching_feedback, list_open_deals ...
s5.title: Official Grain MCP Server: Quick Start Guide

s6.quote: Grain API ... Personal Access Token ... Workspace Access Token ... OAuth2 Flow ... Supports a standard OAuth2 Authorization Code flow, including the PKCE extension.
s6.title: Grain API

s7.quote: To authenticate API calls, the client must add the following header: Authorization: Bearer TOKEN
s7.title: Grain API

s8.quote: What is not included [in Free plan]: file uploads, Trackers, AI coaching, CRM integrations, Teams, and API access.
s8.title: Plans | Grain

s9.quote: Endpoints ... POST /_/public-api/v2/recordings ... GET /_/public-api/v2/recordings/:recording_id/transcript ... Rate Limits: Grain allows a total of 300 requests per minute.
s9.title: Grain API

limitations: The full breadth of V2 API endpoints (beyond recordings) is not fully enumerated in the documentation fetched; there may be more endpoints for highlights, teams, meeting types, webhooks that were only partially visible. The 'Composio toolkit' status for Grain is 'none found' based on search. Pricing page had minor rendering artifacts but plan details were confirmed from the support article.
